hints.text: Bollards: **orange double reflector front / single white back** (only Slovakia + Czechia); rare blue/red variants
Special **extra-wide B-type guardrail** used only by Slovakia & Czechia (SK also uses others occasionally)
Wide round concrete poles, often **paired**; trident / upside-down-triangle poletops
Chevrons **white w/ red arrows**; temporary red-and-white striped signposts
**Hiking markers** (colour strip between two white); cycling signs use the letter **C** (unique to Slovakia)
Prefab **panel apartment blocks** — well-maintained, vibrant colours; **diamond-tile roofs**
Stripy **gas/water poles** (snow-pole-like) common next to the road
Gen3 antenna w/ **grey tape**; red & black Gen4 cars; lots of Gen3 **spring** coverage (Czechia = winter)
**Slovak** distinct letters **Ľ Ô Ä Ŕ Ĺ** (Czech: Ř Ě Ů); street = **ulica**; white street signs w/ blue text + thin red border
Directional signs blue w/ **small white arrows** (Czechia = large filled arrows); km markers = two sections split by a **black horizontal line**; bold sign font
Landscape swings **very mountainous ↔ flat** (Czechia hillier but less mountainous); grey metal roofs common in the east; hip-end roofs + window shutters
